Rohit S. Kodical, Esq. of PAUL HANLEY & HARLEY 510/559-9980, X-143, for Paul, Hanley & Harley, moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs Joanne Walker, Olicer J. Walker III, Michelle Whitson, Barbara Williams, Deidre Walker, Evette Kelly, Ollie Walker and Kevin Walker

Ruling:
No other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT denied without prejudice as to Paul, Hanley & Harley's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs Joanne Walker, Olicer J. Walker III, Michelle Whitson, Barbara Williams, Deidre Walker, Evette Kelly, Ollie Walker and Kevin Walker. (302/REQ) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY CSR: JOE VICKSTEIN, #4780
